---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the DSB-PoC API
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Clear and concise description of the feature.

## Problem Statement
What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work?

## Use Case
Describe a realistic use case for this feature.

## Example
```
Code or API call example showing how it would be used
```

## Related Features
Are there related features or components?

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks other work)
- [ ] High (important for Phase X)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (future consideration)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or design documents

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] Trivial (< 1 hour)
- [ ] Small (1-4 hours)
- [ ] Medium (4-8 hours)
- [ ] Large (1-3 days)
- [ ] Very Large (> 3 days)
